title: Quantum Approaches to Graph Isomorphism
description: Explore quantum algorithms and techniques for the graph isomorphism problem. Learn about the complexity landscape, quantum approaches including coset sampling, and connections to other computational problems.
learningObjectives: Understand the computational complexity of graph isomorphism
Relate graph isomorphism to the hidden subgroup problem
Implement graph invariant computation using quantum circuits
Analyze the limitations of standard quantum approaches
Apply quantum fingerprinting to graph comparison
Explore connections between graph isomorphism and quantum state distinguishability
